name: bookchaowalit-portfolio-mcp
description: MCP Server for Chaowalit Greepoke's Portfolio - Provides access to projects, skills, blog posts, and GitHub activity
author: Chaowalit Greepoke

tools.name: get_projects
tools.description: Get information about Chaowalit Greepoke's projects including title, description, technologies used, demo URLs, and GitHub repositories.

featured.description: If true, only return featured projects

tools.name: get_skills
tools.description: Get information about Chaowalit Greepoke's technical skills organized by category (languages, frameworks, databases, cloud/tools).

tools.name: get_blog_posts
tools.description: Get a list of Chaowalit Greepoke's blog posts with titles, excerpts, publication dates, reading time, and tags.

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return (1-50)

featured.description: If true, only return featured posts

tools.name: get_blog_post
tools.description: Get the full content of a specific blog post by slug.

slug.description: The slug of the blog post to retrieve

tools.name: get_github_repos
tools.description: Get information about Chaowalit Greepoke's GitHub repositories including name, description, URL, stars, language, and last updated date.

limit.description: Maximum number of repositories to return (1-30)

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.description: Get contact information for Chaowalit Greepoke including name, title, location, and available contact channels.
